Our Services

Complete security solutions tailored to your needs

CCTV Installation

Professional installation of high-quality CCTV systems for homes, offices, and commercial properties with optimal coverage planning.

Maintenance & Repair

Regular maintenance services and quick repairs to ensure your security system operates at peak performance 24/7.

Remote Monitoring

Access your cameras from anywhere using our mobile apps and web platforms with real-time alerts and notifications.

Our Products

High-quality security equipment at competitive prices

About Zeal Computer & CCTV Solutions

Zeal Computer & CCTV Solutions is a leading security technology provider in Sri Lanka, dedicated to protecting homes, businesses, and communities through advanced surveillance solutions.

With years of experience in the security industry, we have built a reputation for trust, affordability, and reliability. Our team of certified technicians ensures every installation meets the highest standards of quality and professionalism.

Licensed & Insured Technicians
24/7 Technical Support
2-Year Warranty on All Products
Free Site Inspection
